message.content:
Explore the QIF file at /home/deder/repos/personal-finance-llm/data/personal_data_1-9-26.QIF to understand its structure for building a parser.

Analyze:
1. The different section types (categories, accounts, transactions)
2. Sample records for each type (bank transactions, investment transactions, categories)
3. Any edge cases or unusual formatting
4. The overall structure and order of sections

Read different parts of the file (beginning, middle, end) to get a complete picture. The CLAUDE.md has QIF format specs but real data may have variations.

content.text: I'll explore the QIF file to understand its actual structure and identify any variations from the specification. Let me start by examining different parts of the file.
